studies.title: Acceptability of a digital health application to empower persons with multiple sclerosis with moderate to severe disability: Single-arm prospective pilot study

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the digital health application 'levidex' for persons with multiple sclerosis, as mentioned in the observational groups and study characteristics sections.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a non-randomized, single-arm prospective pilot study, which indicates it is observational in nature and does not involve random allocation to intervention or control groups, fitting the criteria for RWE.
